name: The Fairway Lounge
address: 8476 N Friant Rd suite 102, Fresno, CA 93720
about: The Fairway Lounge is an indoor golf simulator venue offering state-of-the-art technology with advanced sensors and high-definition graphics to recreate every aspect of the game. The facility features 6 simulation bays, including a VIP bay, and provides an upscale, climate-controlled lounge atmosphere. While primarily a pay-per-play venue, it also offers membership options for discounted rates and hosts various tournaments and events, catering to both serious golfers and casual players.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with advanced sensors and HD graphics for a realistic experience
Climate-controlled bays with complimentary golf clubs and direct food/drink service
Family-friendly environment with a clubhouse atmosphere appealing to all ages

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated clubhouse cuisine available via full-service bar with a menu provided
Full-service bar offering drinks, with happy hour specials available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary golf clubs are provided for use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; the venue offers its own clubhouse cuisine and a full-service bar.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round is not specified, but the process includes game setup, profile creation, and gameplay with food/drink service available during the session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Fairway Lounge is described as a family-friendly destination with an ambiance that appeals to both adults and kids, offering creative twists on clubhouse classics.
